title: Extended Drawers: Extensions
description: Adds additional utilities that don't fit in the main Extended Drawers mod.
body:
# Extended Drawers: Extensions
[![Badge showing the amount of downloads on modrinth][modrinth badge]](https://modrinth.com/mod/gDfTLxwP)
[![Badge showing the amount of downloads on curseforge][curseforge badge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extended-drawers-extensions)
[![Badge linking to issues on github][github badge]](https://github.com/MattiDragon/ExtendedDrawers/issues)
[![Badge linking to support on discord][discord badge]](https://discord.gg/26T5KK2PBv)

[modrinth badge]: https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=2d2d2d&colorA=5da545&label=&suffix=%20downloads%20&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/gDfTLxwP&style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=2d2d2d
[curseforge badge]: https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?query=value&url=https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1371952.json&label=&logo=curseforge&color=2d2d2d&style=flat&labelColor=F16436&logoColor=2d2d2d&suffix=%20downloads
[github badge]: https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?query=value&url=https://img.shields.io/github/issues-raw/mattidragon/extendeddrawers.json&label=&logo=github&color=2d2d2d&style=flat&labelColor=6e5494&logoColor=2d2d2d&suffix=%20issues
[discord badge]: https://img.shields.io/discord/760524772189798431?label=&logo=discord&color=2d2d2d&style=flat&labelColor=5865f2&logoColor=2d2d2d

An official addon for [Extended Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers) that provides additional features.
The features provided by this addon are often more powerful and have thus been deemed unfit for the main mod. 

## Features
### Drawer Barrel
A special type of barrel that can be connected to drawer networks. 
These barrels act like vanilla containers, with 27 slots fitting up to 1 stack of items each.
Drawer barrels can be used to implement overflow systems or store unstackable items.

Do note that they have worse performance than regular drawers due to their large slot count and should thus
preferably not be used as primary storage.

### Ender Connector
Allows you to connect drawer networks across long distances without manually building connections.
They need to be manually linked using the Ender Connector Linker and only function within one dimension.

## Other Info
### Modpack permission
You can use this mod in any modpack as long as you don't reupload the mod.
You can get a direct download link from modrinth if you need,
but I'd prefer you create your modpacks on modrinth or curseforge directly.

### Other websites
This mod is only officially available on [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extended-drawers-extensions), [modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/gDfTLxwP) and [github](https://github.com/mattidragon/extendeddrawers).
Any other sites are third-party reuploads and should not be trusted.

### Porting and Forking
You can read my policy on [forking and porting mods](https://gist.github.com/MattiDragon/6b9e71e8516447f53f0d5fb296ab8868).

Current target: 1.21.11.

### Incompatibilities
I intend to try and stay compatible with as many mods as possible, but might abandon support for some if it becomes too hard.

* **Optifine** will never be officially supported. Might work, might not
